# zendesk_group (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk group.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the group.
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the group is public. Note: a private group cannot be changed to public.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean)
- `deleted` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
